title: Sniffy Sand
description: Makes sand, red sand and dead bushes renewable through Sniffers!
body:
Sniffy Sand datapack by RenaeGade!

With Sniffy Sand it is now possible to utilize Sniffers for all your sandy needs!
This datapack makes both regular and red sand sniffable, allowing them do dig up 1-5 items, including the type of sand they're standing on, as well as both dead bushes and sticks (mainly to balance it out just a bit)! 

Not only does this not affect the blocks or loot Sniffers can already snif on and dig up, but it also makes sand, red sand and even dead bushes fully renewable in a vanilla-y, and more importantly, balanced way.

Used on the Rotten Block SMP
